originalTitle: Paint By JSON | Figma API Client
summary: Real API data in your mockups made as easy as lorem ipsum. Discussion | Link
content: A Figma plugin that binds layers to live REST endpoints. Paste a URL, map JSON paths to layer names, save the recipe as a Palette, and apply it to any frame. Design with real data instead of lorem ipsum.
chineseTitle: 通过 JSON 绘制 | Figma API 客户端
chineseSummary: 模型中的真实 API 数据就像 lorem ipsum 一样简单。讨论 |关联
chineseContent: 一个 Figma 插件，将层绑定到实时 REST 端点。粘贴 URL，将 JSON 路径映射到图层名称，将配方保存为调色板，并将其应用到任何框架。使用真实数据而不是 lorem ipsum 进行设计。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
